articles.title: Kevin Hartz’s A* just closed its third fund with $450 million
articles.description: Early-stage venture firm A* Capital just took the wraps off its $450 million Fund III.

articles.title: Former Tesla exec and Heron Power CEO Drew Baglino has founded a heat pump startup
articles.description: Sadi Thermal Machines is Drew Baglino's second startup since leaving Tesla in 2024.

articles.title: Musk mulled handing OpenAI to his children, Altman testifies
articles.description: Altman said that Musk's focus on controlling the initial for-profit gave him pause because OpenAI was dedicated to keeping advanced AI out of the hands of a single person, and Altman, with his experience running the prominent startup accelerator Y Combinator, knew "founders who had control usually did not give it up."

articles.title: Anthropic warns investors against secondary platforms offering access to its shares
articles.description: "Any sale or transfer of Anthropic stock, or any interest in Anthropic stock, offered by these firms is void and will not be recognized on our books and records," the company's support page reads.

articles.title: Potholes cost cities millions: This company is using AI and trucks to fix them
articles.description: Fleet management company Samsara has developed an AI model to detect different kinds of potholes and gauge how fast they're deteriorating.

articles.title: Report: Google and SpaceX in talks to put data centers into orbit
articles.description: Google and SpaceX are in talks to build data centers in orbit, pitching space as the future home for AI compute, even as costs today remain far higher than on the ground.

articles.title: Everything Google announced at its Android Show, from Googlebooks to vibe-coded widgets
articles.description: Google unveiled its new AI-first Googlebooks laptops, more agentic Gemini features, vibe-coded Android widgets, Gemini in Chrome, refreshed Android Auto, and more ahead of I/O.

articles.title: The AI legal services industry is heating up — Anthropic is getting in on the action
articles.description: Anthropic's new tools are designed to help law firms automate specific clerical functions — things like document search and review, case law resources, deposition prep, document drafting, and other related areas.

articles.title: Google adds Gemini-powered dictation to Gboard, which could be bad news for dictation startups
articles.description: Google's transcription feature will initially launch with Samsung Galaxy and Google Pixel phones.

articles.title: Android adds a feature to stop you from doomscrolling
articles.description: Google’s new Android feature, Pause Point, forces you to wait before opening distracting apps in an effort to curb addictive scrolling habits.

articles.title: Google unveils Googlebook, a new line of AI-native laptops
articles.description: The company says Googlebooks, which are launching this fall, are the first laptops designed from the ground up for Gemini Intelligence to offer personal and proactive help.

articles.title: Google’s ‘Create My Widget’ feature will let you vibe-code your own widgets
articles.description: To create a widget, users will be able to describe what they want using natural language. For example, you could ask the feature to "suggest three high-protein meal prep recipes every week" in order to get a custom dashboard that you can add and resize on your home screen.

articles.title: Google brings agentic AI and vibe-coded widgets to Android
articles.description: Gemini Intelligence will also include Gboard-based dictation and form-filling capabilities.

articles.title: Google launches new Android security feature to help uncover spyware attacks
articles.description: Intrusion Logging is a new part of Android’s Advanced Protection Mode, which aims to help protect human rights activists, journalists, and dissidents from government spyware attack and law enforcement forensic devices.

articles.title: Indigo brings the open social web to one app
articles.description: Indigo's new social app lets you cross-post to the open social web, including Mastodon and Bluesky, and browse a unified timeline.

articles.title: US bank discloses security lapse after sharing customer data with AI app
articles.description: Community Bank, which operates in Pennsylvania, Ohio, and West Virginia, disclosed a cybersecurity incident that exposed customers’ names, dates of birth, and Social Security numbers.

articles.title: Threads tests a Meta AI integration that works similarly to Grok
articles.description: The feature is designed to help people get real-time context about trends and breaking stories, as well as receive recommendations, all within conversations.

articles.title: Exaforce raises $125M Series B to build AI for catching and stopping cyberattacks as they happen
articles.description: As bad actors weaponize AI to exploit software vulnerabilities at unprecedented speed, companies are increasingly recognizing the need to bolster their cybersecurity defenses. The round valued the three-year-old startup at $725 million.

articles.title: Waymo issues recall to deal with a flooding problem
articles.description: Waymo has issued a software recall that makes its robotaxis more cautious around flooded areas. A "final remedy" is in the works.

articles.title: Instructure strikes deal with hackers who breached it twice
articles.description: The maker of the Canvas school software said it "reached an agreement" with the hackers, but provided no guarantees that the hackers would not release the data or keep their word.

articles.title: The newest AI boom pitch: Host a mini data center at your home
articles.description: The plan aims to speed up AI compute deployment while compensating residents.

articles.title: FDA chief resigns after Trump admin forced approval of fruity e-cigs
articles.description: Makary reportedly spent his year bucking Trump admin and making industry enemies.

articles.title: Twin brothers wipe 96 gov't databases minutes after being fired
articles.description: A case study in why credentials are revoked before firings.

articles.title: “Will I be OK?” Teen died after ChatGPT pushed deadly mix of drugs, lawsuit says
articles.description: Teen trusted ChatGPT to help him “safely” experiment with drugs, logs show.

articles.title: Microsoft will lean on your CPU to speed up Windows 11's apps and animations
articles.description: "All modern operating systems do this, including macOS and Linux."

articles.title: eBay rejects GameStop's $56B offer: "Your proposal is neither credible nor attractive"
articles.description: eBay board doubts GameStop's ability to buy and operate the much larger firm.

articles.title: Google's Android-powered laptops are called Googlebooks, and they're coming this year
articles.description: Google has revealed its vision for the AI laptop of tomorrow.

articles.title: Android is getting a big AI overhaul in 2026
articles.description: Google has big plans for Android in 2026, and most of it is AI.

articles.title: Amazon employees are "tokenmaxxing" due to pressure to use AI tools
articles.description: Workers are using an internal AI tool to automate non-essential tasks.

articles.title: Once again, SpaceX has set a new record for the tallest rocket ever built
articles.description: SpaceX cleared an important milestone Monday on the road to launching a new version of Starship.

articles.title: Linux bitten by second severe vulnerability in as many weeks
articles.description: Production-version patches are coming online and should be installed pronto.

articles.title: Audi has a new Q9 flagship coming soon: Here's its interior
articles.description: Audi made sure to consult American tastes for its first full-size SUV.

articles.title: After banning foreign routers, FCC says existing ones can get updates until 2029
articles.description: FCC extends waiver allowing routers and drones to get patches for two more years.

articles.title: Data center guzzled 30 million gallons of water, and nobody noticed for months
articles.description: Can AI save us from the AI industry’s endless thirst for water? Outlook not so good.

articles.title: Passengers from hantavirus ship arrive in US; 3 people in biocontainment
articles.description: A US passenger tested "mildly positive," but WHO is calling it "inconclusive" for now.

articles.title: Starlink shuts down its GPS-style cheat code. Researchers may unlock it anyway.
articles.description: Shutdown of Starlink location feature won’t dampen interest in GPS alternatives.

articles.title: iOS, macOS, and iPadOS 26.5 updates arrive with encrypted RCS messaging and more
articles.description: Probably the last big updates we'll see before the next versions appear at WWDC.

articles.title: Samsung made a “mockery” of Dua Lipa by putting her picture on TV boxes, lawsuit says
articles.description: Lipa says her picture contributed to Samsung's "enormous revenue."

articles.title: Pirates are already playing Forza Horizon 6 days before its launch
articles.description: Crackers take advantage of unencrypted files that briefly appeared on Steam.

articles.title: F1 set for another engine tweak in 2027, and what's this about V8s?
articles.description: Rather than dig in, the sport is being proactive about fixing the problem.

tech.summary:
今日科技动态摘要

1. **投资与创业动态**：Kevin Hartz 的 A* 基金完成第三期募资，规模达4.5亿美元；前特斯拉高管兼Heron Power CEO Drew Baglino 创立了一家热泵初创公司；Anthropic 警告投资者警惕二级平台交易其股份的风险。

2. **AI与法律行业**：AI法律服务领域持续升温，Anthropic 也加入其中；同时，AI 语音输入和智能助手功能进一步扩展，如 Google 在 Gboard 中加入 Gemini 驱动的语音输入，可能对相关初创公司造成冲击。

3. **Google 重大发布**：Google 在 Android 发布会上推出多项新功能，包括 AI 原生笔记本“Googlebook”、可自定义的“Create My Widget”功能（支持“vibe-coding”方式制作小部件）、以及防沉迷的“停止无意识刷屏”功能。此外，Google 还与 SpaceX 探讨将数据中心送入轨道的计划。

4. **安全与隐私**：Google 推出新的 Android 安全功能，帮助用户发现间谍软件攻击；同时，Android 新增防沉迷功能，旨在减少用户无目的刷屏行为。

5. **新兴技术与基础设施**：一家公司利用AI和卡车技术修复城市道路坑洼问题，有望节省城市数百万美元；此外，Indigo 推出一款整合开放社交网络的统一应用。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：Google 在 Android 发布会上集中展示了多项 AI 驱动的创新功能，特别是 AI 原生笔记本和“vibe-coding”小部件，标志着 AI 与移动操作系统深度融合的新阶段。

ai.summary:
今日AI动态摘要

1. **AWS与Hugging Face合作**：介绍了在AWS上构建和训练基础模型的模块化方法，包括混合专家模型（EMO）的预训练技术，以及vLLM从V0到V1的强化学习正确性改进。
2. **Google AI扩展应用场景**：AI驱动的Google Finance扩展至欧洲；创意人士利用AI为小企业制作广告；搜索功能新增5项园艺技巧。
3. **OpenAI多领域进展**：金融团队与NVIDIA工程师利用Codex提升工作效率；AutoScout24通过AI工作流实现工程规模化；ChatGPT在2026年初的采用率扩大；企业级AI扩展实践。
4. **开源与评测动态**：Hugging Face在开放ASR排行榜中引入“Benchmaxxer Repellant”机制，以提升评测准确性与公平性。
5. **OpenAI新举措**：推出DeployCo帮助企业围绕智能构建业务，并启动校园网络学生俱乐部兴趣征集。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：OpenAI发布DeployCo及企业AI规模化实践，标志着AI从工具向企业级基础设施的全面转型。

articles.title: Tokyo Trial debunks notorious Yasukuni Shrine's inverted narrative

cctv.summary:
今日新闻联播动态摘要

1. 东京审判揭露靖国神社歪曲历史事实的错误叙事。
2. 强调国际社会对日本军国主义侵略历史的正义审判与正确认知。
3. 反对任何美化侵略、否认历史罪行的行径。

今日最值得关注的发展：东京审判作为历史定论，有力驳斥了靖国神社对历史的颠倒与篡改。
